chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Nerona Imu Descends' — Imu's true form and face are revealed for the first time as they arrive in Elbaf. Appearing as Saint Nerona Imu, King of the World and one of the First Twenty, Imu descends with S-shaped horns, a long tail, wings, and black Hagoromo clouds, surrounding Aurust Castle with black flames. The Five Elders tried to prevent Imu from leaving the Holy Land, but the ruler saw no other choice. A force similar to Conqueror's Haki but far heavier and more oppressive dominates the environment itself. Next chapter 1180 expected April 19, 2026 (one-week break after Ch.1179).

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Chapter 307 continues the story as the White Tiger of the West maintains a watchful eye on Sakyung (Yeon Cheon-mu), drawn to him after the previous chapter's events in which the beast eliminated intruders without absorbing their essence. Sakyung faces new training challenges with his nano machine while rival factions continue plotting against him. Previous chapter 306 was released April 1, 2026.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Season 2 ended with Ch. 68. Expected to return around May–June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: 'What's Going On Here?!' — During a group outing, Okarun and his companion visit the dinosaur exhibit, then suggest meeting up with Momo and Jiji. At the aquarium, Jiji admits he has been secretly channeling ki into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: 'Seizing the Crown' — Karasu passes to Shidou in a surprise fast-break move. Karasu explains that Shidou's presence influences everyone around him and there's no way to communicate with him conventionally — so rather than opposing him, he rides his flow. Isagi reflects on how Karasu is his opposite: flexible and easy-going, able to both approach and distance himself from Shidou, while Isagi has never been able to form a reaction with Shidou. Barou later scores using Karasu's strategy.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: 'Showdown' — A power outage hits all of Tokyo, with the only lights visible in an old castle. Shishiba infiltrates the castle and ties his hair back in a ponytail after the static electricity from Gozu makes it frizz. On the rooftop, Gozu destroys Shishiba's hammer leaving only the handle, then kicks Shishiba back. Their clash produces one of the series' best spreads, with dramatic lighting casting shadows through window grills. Next chapter 255 expected April 12, 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Main series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On' on September 30, 2024. The sequel spin-off manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' reached its own final chapter (Ch. 25) in March 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232 on March 25, 2026, ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Part 1 had 97 chapters; Part 2 had 135 chapters (total: 232). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 Finale. Main series on hiatus since February 2025. Spin-off 'Tower of God: Urek Mazino' is ongoing, with Chapter 57 as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Next chapter 132 expected April 12, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date announced as of April 2026.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: 'Context of the Constellations (1)' — In the three years since Kim Dokja's disappearance, Jung Heewon has risen to legendary status as leader of the Chungcheong Alliance and is courted by constellations. However, she holds deep resentment toward her sponsor Uriel, who vanished after the demon king selection. The chapter explores Kim Dokja's return to Seoul Dome after parallel-world trials, where he is embraced by Jung Heewon and surviving party members. 'Kim Dokja's Company' earns constellation recognition and a monument as a scenario reward.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: Chapter 396 continues Jiwoo's intensive training arc with Kartein, focusing on incorporating healing mana into his electrical strikes to prevent physical recoil damage. Updated every Tuesday on Naver and WEBTOON.

chapters.title: Return of the Blossoming Blade
chapters.summary: Ongoing manhwa serialization on WEBTOON (also known as Return of the Mount Hua Sect). Biweekly release schedule.

chapters.title: The Beginning After the End
chapters.summary: Ongoing webtoon adaptation continues. The original light novel concluded in August 2025 at Chapter 529.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G is in production as of 2026.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus a bonus epilogue Chapter 431 in the final volume, showing the characters' futures years after the final battle. Collected in 42 tankōbon volumes.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication. Collected in 29 tankōbon volumes.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: 'Allies' Self-Sacrifice' — Part of the Great War of Qin and Zhao Arc. Weekly serialization continues in Weekly Young Jump. Chapter 872 expected April 9, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: 'Life or Death 2' — Tatsumaki faces the Aggregation Blue Eel Dragon, which makes its debut, while Genos battles to protect her. Suiko and Mirror continue their confrontation. The Neo Heroes Uprising Arc intensifies. Previous chapter 227 'Life or Death' was released March 26, 2026, in which Flashy Flash eliminated Heavy Smoker.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026. Next chapter 243 expected April 9, 2026.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.
